title: PlausiDen LLC — Comprehensive IT for the Modern Enterprise
description: Massachusetts-based independent IT consultancy. Operations, cyber security, AI, automation, software, hardware — engineered for businesses that take infrastructure seriously.

footer.colophon: © 2026 PlausiDen LLC. Reproducible builds. Signed audit chains. No third-party trackers.

sections.title: Comprehensive IT for the modern enterprise.
sections.lede: General-purpose AND specific-purpose technology solutions for businesses that take infrastructure seriously. Operations, cyber security, AI, automation, software, hardware — under one engineering team.

background.alt: Wide editorial photograph evoking enterprise IT infrastructure

sections.text: Six engineering practices under one roof. No hand-offs between consultancies, no vendor lock-in seams, no scope gaps.

items.definition: Day-to-day systems administration, monitoring, incident response, change control. The infrastructure runs; the audit chain proves it.
Zero-trust architecture, threat modeling, supply-chain attestation, penetration testing, compliance evidence. SOC 2 II / HIPAA / GDPR-ready.
AI deployment with the Critic-gated proposal model — LLMs generate candidates, LFI evaluates against typed policies. Auditable, interpretable, replayable.
Workflow automation, edge-device integration, sensor networks, industrial-control integration. Same engineering rigor as the office stack.
Custom Rust + WASM applications. Typed contracts at every boundary, reproducible builds, signed attestation. We ship the source.
Procurement, deployment, lifecycle management, end-of-life secure disposal. Vendor-neutral; we pick what fits, not what we're paid to recommend.

sections.caption: Six engineering practices, one team, one audit chain.

sections.text: We work with shops that already have an IT team and need a peer, not a replacement. We work with compliance shops that ship audit evidence directly to regulators. We work with founders who refuse the trade-off between fast, reliable, and secure — and the math says they don't have to.

items.value: Every engagement opens with a threat model and a signed change record.
items.hint: No 'we'll get to security in phase two.'

items.value: On-call rotation includes the same engineers who built the system.
items.hint: No handoff to a tier-1 voice queue.

items.value: Every artifact ships to your repo. Walk away anytime with everything.
items.hint: Source, audit chain, infrastructure-as-code, all of it.

items.value: Reproducible builds + signed reports. The chain hash is the proof.
items.hint: Compliance auditors stop asking follow-up questions.

sections.body: We replaced three SaaS subscriptions plus a staff IT contractor with PlausiDen. The audit chain ships straight to compliance and the auditor stopped asking follow-up questions.
sections.attribution: the kind of outcome the engagement model targets

sections.caption: We work with teams that already have IT — and need a peer, not a replacement.

sections.eyebrow: Ready to elevate your IT strategy?
sections.title: Start your journey.
sections.lede: A free consultation, no obligation. We listen first, scope second, propose third.
